events.volcano_start: 🌋 ALERT: A chain of {count} volcanoes has awakened!
events.volcano_ruin: 🔥 The eruption has ravaged the city of {name}.
events.epidemic_start: 🦠 ALERT: A black plague has been reported in {name}!
events.epidemic_end: 💊 The epidemic has finally died out in {name} after heavy losses.
events.epidemic_death: 💀 {name} is now nothing more than an open-air graveyard.
events.epidemic_spread: ☣️ The merchant {merchant_name} has brought the black plague to {city_name}! The population is declining.
events.human_epidemic_death: 💀 {name} succumbed to the plague while traveling.
events.fishing_success: {fisherman_char} {fisherman_name} from {fisherman_city} brought back a great catch!
events.settler_lost: 💀 A group of settlers from {settler_city_name} got lost in the wildlands.
events.settler_found_village: {new_village_char}️  New village of {new_village_name} founded! A road connects it to {home_city_name}.
events.settler_found_village_independant: {new_village_char}️  The independent village of {new_village_name} has been founded.
events.abduction_start: 🛸 A strange glow descends from the sky... {name} has vanished!
events.abduction_end: ✨ {name} reappeared in a field, looking confused.
events.trade_road_built: 🛤️ A trade road now connects {home_city} and {target_city}!

entities.city_founded: 🏛️  The primordial city of {name} was founded at ({x}, {y}).
entities.settler_spawn: 🚶 Overpopulated! A group of settlers leaves {name} for the unknown.
entities.village_promoted: 🏛️ The village of {name} at ({x}, {y}) has grown into a city.

ui.bestiary_stats_species: Strength:{strength}  Perception:{perception}  Speed:{speed_sign}{speed}  Fertility:{fertility}  Harvest:{harvest}  Trade:{trade}  Defense:{defense}

bestiary_guide.speed_desc: Distance traveled per cycle. Determines how well an animal can flee predators or catch prey.
bestiary_guide.perception_desc: Detection radius for prey, predators, and humans. Higher values allow reaction from further away.
bestiary_guide.weight_desc: Body mass of the animal. Determines how much food hunters recover from each successful kill.
bestiary_guide.fear_desc: Reactivity to influence heatmaps (fear, scent). High values cause more frequent fleeing behavior.
bestiary_guide.food_desc: Food range delivered to a hunter after a successful kill. Directly impacts settlement survival.
bestiary_guide.danger_desc: Probability of attacking nearby humans. High danger animals actively threaten settlements.
bestiary_guide.strength_desc: Damage dealt in combat. Improves soldier effectiveness during raids and defense.
bestiary_guide.species_perception_desc: Detection range for resources and enemies for every member of the species.
bestiary_guide.speed_mod_desc: Bonus or penalty to movement speed applied to every individual of the species from birth.
bestiary_guide.fertility_desc: Birth rate of settlements. High fertility accelerates population growth.
bestiary_guide.harvest_desc: Yield of farmers and fishermen. Increases food produced each cycle.
bestiary_guide.trade_desc: Bonus to trade between cities. Speeds up resource accumulation and diplomacy.
bestiary_guide.defense_desc: Reduces losses during enemy raids. Improves the resilience of walls and garrisons.
bestiary_guide.growth_desc: Accelerates population in cities under this faith. Encourages new village founding.
bestiary_guide.religion_perception_desc: Improves collective vigilance of believers against threats, migrations, and climate changes.
bestiary_guide.religion_harvest_desc: Agricultural blessing — increases believer yields and reduces the risk of famine.
bestiary_guide.religion_trade_desc: Encourages trade routes between believers and reduces friction during exchanges.
bestiary_guide.religion_defense_desc: Strengthens fortifications and resilience of cities that actively practice this religion.
